prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fantasy portrait of a young woman in an enchanted nocturnal flower garden. She is seated close to the camera, framed from head to knees, wearing an elaborate dark gothic floral dress in deep navy, black, violet, and magenta tones with lace, sheer sleeves, layered petals, and delicate tangled threads. Her long wavy dark brown hair with magenta highlights falls around her shoulders. One hand rests softly against her cheek and the other rests in the foreground on her lap, with elegant natural fingers and a delicate dark floral wrist accessory. Her face should be intentionally obscured by a centered rectangular privacy block, a vertical muted mauve-brown gradient rectangle covering the entire face area from forehead to chin, while the rest of the portrait remains detailed and realistic. On her head is an extravagant floral crown made of exactly 8 prominent visible elements: 1 large white daisy-like flower near the upper right, 2 dark navy roses, 1 bright magenta flower on the left, 1 small pale blue flower, 1 cluster of tiny gold dried flowers, 1 black translucent leaf cluster, and 1 set of thin curling gold wire loops. Add flowing satin ribbons in hot pink and deep blue curling around her hair and shoulders. The background is a dreamy dark blue and purple bokeh garden filled with glowing blurred blossoms, sparkling particles, and soft fairy-light highlights. Use dramatic low-key lighting with vivid cyan, violet, and magenta rim lights, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed textures, realistic skin on visible areas, glossy petals, intricate lace, magical atmosphere, high contrast, professional fashion editorial photography, 9:16 vertical composition. Avoid text, logos, extra people, distorted hands, or revealing the face behind the privacy block.
